Updated the action-vocabulary audit for `post_topic` and `rejected_post_topic`, including an explicit `build_rejected_transition(... action="rejected_post_topic" ...)` assertion. Also updated stale existing renderer expectations from old `Live update:` / `Update:` prefixes to the renderer's current `## <headline>` output. Verification passed: `pytest tests/test_topic_editor_core.py tests/test_topic_editor_runtime.py -x -q` -> 152 passed, 2 third-party warnings.
